title: Lebanon ceasefire violations: 8 killed on Day 8 despite extension
snippet: Comprehensive Al Jazeera summary of Day 8 ceasefire violations: 6 killed in Bint Jbeil, 2 killed in Touline airstrike, Hezbollah fires rockets at Shtula settlement. Total 8 killed one day after extension announced. UN calls for 'immediate investigation.' Both sides accuse other of violations. Deadliest day since ceasefire began Apr 17.
tag_reason: Comprehensive update combining all Day 8 violations into single report. Deadliest day since ceasefire began. Update to ceasefire extension coverage.
